The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group Of Institutions for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group Of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.

placements.overview:
Founded in 2009, Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group Of Institutions is a private institute. It is located in Ongole, Andhra Pradesh. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group Of Institutions provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 5 courses across specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group Of Institutions fees ranges between INR 54,000 to 1,72,000. The student intake for these courses is 420. Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group Of Institutions offers these course across fields such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group Of Institutions offers all the campus facilities to students.

Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group Of Institutions is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group Of Institutions programmes is around INR 54,000 to 1,72,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Best for studying and the future.

review_content.Placements: I am a Computer Science and Engineering student under JNTUK, and the study is moderate, and internships held by the management are very good. The highest package is 12 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. The roles offered in my college, like team leader and companies are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have labs in every portion and there are Wi-Fi facilities and a mess. The food is good and not that bad and we have a central library in our college.
review_content.Faculty: All the teachers who are there are not the same, but most of the teachers are very friendly and helpful in the study. Curriculum is relevant.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is so good in this college.

review_content.Placements: Around 92 percent of students are placed, and they are very happy about it. The average placement package is 45 to 50 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, Amazon, Flipkart and many more. The top roles are in software development and app development.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have many facilities in college for students like libraries, incubator rooms, and labs with Wi-Fi facilities, which are very useful for students. The quality of the food is actually so good, and the mess also has quality food, which is very tasty.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides good academics and decent placements.

review_content.Placements: Rise Krishna Sai Gandhi Group of Institutions in Ongole offers moderate placement opportunities. Students who take the CRT training course are mostly getting placements. The main recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and HCL. Around 80-90% of students are being selected.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure of our campus is very good. We have separate floors for each department, and labs for every year of students. We have an AC facility in the labs, and the hostel is very good. We have a hostel for both boys and girls. The college also provides a mess for students with good-quality food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good.

review_content.Placements: 70-80% of students get placed in our college. The highest package offered is 7 LPA. The lowest package offered in our college is 4 LPA. A maximum of all students got internships from our college from several companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is good. The food quality is also good compared to other colleges near our college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful to us. They are qualified. They also give us the best knowledge. The teaching quality is good. The course curriculum is relevant, and it makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are somewhat difficult to pass. They all are good at teaching. They are friendly towards us, and we are proud to have those staff members in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Good preparation for placement in top companies like Infosys and so on. All students are placed. 95% of students are placed. The highest package of my college is 7.5 LPA, and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. My college gives good training to crack the interviews.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good hostel culture but no Wi-Fi. We have a good library. Facilities, classrooms, and infrastructure are all very good. Hostel climate is so good. Hostel is so clean and neat. Hostel food is 70% good. Hostel maintenance is perfect. College climate is also good and greenery. Sports and games are also there. There is no medical facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: College with good faculty, placemennts in 2023, infrastructure, and facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 20% of students got placed. The highest salary package offered in computer science as a software developer is 3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are HCL, Tech Mahindra, etc. Most of the students got scholarships in our course. Top roles offered are software and coding. Students got placed in TCS, Tech Mahindra, HCL, and some start-up companies. Mostly tech background companies provide roles. Students should have high communication and tech skills in Python, Java, database, HTML, and CSS.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have a central library and a big playground. Our college conducts cultural events. We have separate labs. The hostel is good. We have a friendly warden and other friendly facilities. There are around 8 members per room. Good lockers are provided. Beds are also good. The food is good, clean, and hygienic. The warden is also friendly. Surroundings should be proper and cleaned daily. Solar power is also available for college only.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have a central library and a big playground. Our college conducts cultural events. We have separate labs. The hostel is good. reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and one can learn a lot from it.

reviews.review_heading: There is nothing bad about my college. The college and its management are good.

It is a famous college in the Prakasam district. The infrastructure of the college is also very nice. It is very convenient with the timings of the college.

In the canteen, a lot of varieties of food items are available. Medical facilities are provided on every floor.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied by joining this college because I got placed in an MNC company.
reviews.review_text: It provides pretty good facilities like a library and a parking place. For every department and lab, there is a separate Wi-Fi in it. They cook different items every week. I think for sports there is no space for playing games like cricket, football, and basketball. There is a limited area for playing. There is one cantee...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: We have integrated labs and a 4-floor central library with a digital library facility. Labs are well-equipped with equipment and computers. They give more priority to labs. Every lab has two assistants to assist you, and they will clarify every doubt with detailed notes with politeness. The college provides library cards, so you can borrow the books from library and take them home. They don't charge a single rupee for books. Air-conditioners are available in the central library. In every compute...

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members available in 2020.
reviews.review_text: I don't know about the hostel, but my friends told me that the food was average and sometimes good. However, the security of the hostel was very nice. They will take care of every student. They provide study hours and all medical facilities. They will provide sports and games for hostel students.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.

answer.text: Madha Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.review_title: My experience at this College.

review_content.Placements: Placement starts from in fourth semester. Interns are also given in college, and companies will come to the college and provide jobs to those who are eligible for the company and the post. Companies like Deloitte, TCS, IBM etc. Visit our college. And the average package was 8 LPA, and the highest package was around 38 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The University hostel provides you two accommodation rooms. The rooms of the hostel are very big and spacious; they provide modern amenities like tables, chairs, fans, cupboards, etc. Mess is managed by the mess authority in my college, and follow different types of food routines everyday, they provide healthy and nutritious food to us. At the start of every semester, every student in the hostel has to register for mess and hostel facilities on the college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in English - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Great college experience here.

review_content.Placements: From the 6th semester, students become eligible for campus placements, and postgraduate students can become eligible in the 4th semester (final year). Several companies like Sony, Samsung, HP, Oracle, etc., visit our campus to offer jobs to students, with the highest LPA of 40 and an average package of 8 LPA. My plan after my post-graduation is to pursue higher studies abroad.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every student will be given a hostel room in the college. For freshmen, there are double-sharing rooms, and from the second year onwards, they will have single rooms. The infrastructure is very good and beautiful. There is a radiant cooling system in hostel blocks so that every room remains cool even at noon in the summer. There are two messes in this college, and the food they provide is very tasty, delicious, healthy, and nutritious. Attached bathrooms are in rooms, and the cleaning staff cleans the rooms daily. One big cricket field and badminton court are also on the hostel campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in English - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: My college experience is awesome.

review_content.Placements: Students become eligible to sit in placements from the 4th semester. Over 170+ companies visit our college campus to recruit students. Some MNCs also come to our campus, like Amazon, Flipkart, Infosys, IBM, Dell, etc. Many other companies also visit. The highest package at this college is 38 LPA, and the average package is around 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is excellent. The meals are very tasty and provide healthy food for us. Non-veg is also served on Wednesdays, three times a day. Each room is equipped with a bed, a table, an almirah, etc. Cleaners clean the rooms and all common areas on a daily basis, and the bathrooms and washrooms are hygienic. The hostel rent is affordable for students.

reviews.review_heading: I love this college very much.
reviews.review_text: I used the hostel facility during my UG days. The hostel facilities were very good; the non-AC rooms were spacious with sufficient washrooms for students and were cleaned regularly. The meals served were also very good, tasty, healthy and nutritious. Security was well ensured, and a bed, cupboard, study table, and mirror were provided to each student in their rooms. Apart from this, there was a huge dining table in the dining space on each floor.

reviews.review_heading: I like this college very much.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are decent. They offer single, double, and triple occupancy in rare cases. Rooms contains a fan table, bed, almirah, etc. The bathrooms are very clean and cleaning staff cleans the bathroom and hostel room daily. The meals provided are very good, tasty, and delicious. They provide food four times a day. Registration is done by both online and offline and it is very easy to register for hostel and the rent of the hostel is affordable to students.

reviews.review_heading: My experience at this College.
reviews.review_text: The University hostel provides you two accommodation rooms. The rooms of the hostel are very big and spacious; they provide modern amenities like tables, chairs, fans, cupboards, etc. Mess is managed by the mess authority in my college, and follow different types of food routines everyday, they provide healthy and nutritious food to us. At the start of every semester, every student in the hostel has to register for mess and hostel facilities on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Great college experience here.
reviews.review_text: Every student will be given a hostel room in the college. For freshmen, there are double-sharing rooms, and from the second year onwards, they will have single rooms. The infrastructure is very good and beautiful. There is a radiant cooling system in hostel blocks so that every room remains cool even at noon in the summer. reviews.review_heading: My college experience is awesome.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is excellent. The meals are very tasty and provide healthy food for us. Non-veg is also served on Wednesdays, three times a day. Each room is equipped with a bed, a table, an almirah, etc. Cleaners clean the rooms and all common areas on a daily basis, and the bathrooms and washrooms are hygienic. The hostel rent is affordable for students.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend every student to take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The hostel at this university feels like home to us. There are AC and Non-AC rooms, but the charges for AC rooms are high. They provide good-quality meals, and the meals are cooked in a very hygienic way. 24/7 Wi-Fi, water, and electricity facilities are also provided to us. In the hostel, there are students who are very attentive to maintaining their health and physique. The registration process is very simple; it is done by filling out the hostel form.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome experience at this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is very nice here. Hostel rooms are very big and equipped with all the modern amenities and the rooms have a balcony as well. Cleaning staff daily cleans the hostel rooms which is a very good thing about this hostel. Meals are provided 4 times a day and the menu card changes every week. It is not clean and not good. In the hostel, there is a power cut issue daily from morning to evening, which is a huge drawback. Food and canteen were good.

reviews.review_heading: I was very unfortunate that I joined this college only to get everything ruined.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent but the quality of food is very poor compared to what they are charging. They charge INR 70000 per year approximately and the thing is that during covid when there were no students living in hostel even then they charged hostel fees.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but dissatisfied with the facilities.
reviews.review_text: My college has a modern and well-equipped infrastructure that includes labs, libraries, and classrooms with projects and other audio-visual equipment. But hostel facilities are not good as the food quality is not good and issues with the cleanliness of the hostel and environment. Other things like medical facilities, sports, and games are just decent not even good and you have to cooperate with them.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: We have sufficient labs, but the equipment doesn't work sometimes. A good library is available. I was not a hosteler, but the facilities provided were average. Everyone disliked the food. We have sports tournaments every year, but we have to play after the classes.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good placements records, teachers and excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities for students, especially for those who live in hostel free Wi-Fi available for students. Sports kit is available for students, and a very good and beautiful playground is available. A practical lab is available. There is a good library where books can be issued for 15 days, and many standard books are available. Classrooms are good, and many of the classes consist of the projector. The college has two canteens in which you can find many things samosa, ch...

reviews.review_heading: The campus and infrastructure are the best, but the quality of food in the mess is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The whole campus is enabled with high-speed Wi-Fi. Classrooms are well maintained and updated with smart class facilities. Labs are good for practice. The only issue is the lack of air-conditioned classrooms during the summer season. Overall, the college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, but low number of placements and bad crowd.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it is the first private college in Rajasthan. Every branch has its own block. The labs and classrooms are well-furnished, and the college organises extracurricular activities from time to time. Sports facilities are also good. The college has a football ground, tennis, basketball, and badminton courts separately. Volleyball and kabaddi grounds are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good engineering college.
reviews.review_text: All the labs in IET are well-equipped and furnished. All the technical equipment is present, especially in mechanical, IT and computer branches. Quality of food is good, especially Kheerpoori that is offered on Tuesday, and Chole Bahtoore offered on Wednesday. All the hostels are very good and ventilated. I liked most of the NBH hostels.

reviews.review_heading: A standard college for Engineering!
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is normal. Classrooms and labs are okay. Mechanical labs has almost all of the machinery which is helpful in the course. All the department (branches) has there own building. Medical facilities are good. There are many events to promote sports in the college. There is a cricket/football ground and a basketball/tennis/badminton court in the campus and some indoor games. There is a Gym both for boys & girls separately. There is a small canteen in the campus which is good but nothing...

reviews.review_heading: This college is good. Faculty are good. This college provided many companies for placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities like labs, classrooms, library and medical are available in this college. The quality of labs is good. The food quality is also good. There are 3 canteens in the college. The hostel rooms are good. In this college, they provided good quality foods for hostel students. There is no Wi-Fi facility available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is bad to spend your 4 years of life as it has the bad infrastructure and no placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good, and I don't like it personally. There is no centralised A/C in the college, and even computer labs are also without A/C. The canteen is not good. There is no Wi-Fi facility. No celebrity came to the college for any function till I am there in the college. The hostel rooms are okay, but the mess food is bad. I didn't face any issue related to the infrastructure. Every year, they conduct the annual sports day. The classrooms are not digital as they don't have access...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The campus has a Wi-Fi facility with fast unlimited internet access. Labs are fully equipped with old models systems with window 7 and 1 GB RAMs. Classrooms are just normal, and students can study silently in the library. Facilities of the hostel include 5 meters by 4 meters rooms with two beds, and two students can stay in one room. They can also be accommodated in a room with 3 beds of the same dimension. The mess serves purely vegetarian with a variety of food items every day. The food could ...

reviews.review_heading: The good college in the term of infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It is best in the engineering point of view. Anyone who is interested in the infrastructure can get admission in this college. The building designing is good and tremendous. We need not worry about that.

reviews.review_heading: An institute which makes your career bright.
reviews.review_text: The institute provides good and disciplined classes. It is has well-furnished classrooms. The whole institute has Wi-Fi joined, lab has well conditioned instruments, machines, peaceful environment in library,  24 hours medical services and sports field  are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to take admission in this college, then you are on your own risk.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and furniture are average. Laboratories have all the equipment related to practicals, but they don't have good lab assistants. The library is also good, but there is a shortage of some books. Sports and games facilities are not good. Canteen and hostel rooms are just average and are not impressive. Events and fests are organised by the college every year. They are good enough.

reviews.review_heading: The average performance of college. Please do not take admission and make a fool of yourself.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also in the early stages of the college. It is not so good. The computers are of the past era with Windows XP with 256 MB ram. The furniture is also very old, and it's such a poor college. No Wi-Fi is available. Hostels are also not in good condition.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Abhinav Hi-Tech College of Engineering (AHTC)?

faqs.answer:
A:    Abhinav Hi-Tech College of Engineering (AHTC) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognized as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.

Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed bachelor degree of 3 years duration (Except Oriental Languages) and secured the above mentioned percentage.
45% is applicable for candidates belonging to reserved category.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program/ Open Distance Learning (ODL) within the jurisdiction of University should have recognition by joint committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with faculty, *** off on the college for not having placements, the campus was great.

review_content.Placements: We didn't have any placements for the year that we graduated as the TPO officer decided to resign at a critical moment. This caused the college not getting any bigshot companies or smaller startups, we did face the issue of being unemployed but this gave us the push we needed to get into the career market with motivation as the pressure was too high.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our College had a minimum of three labs, each for a branch. These labs were all functional but only one or two were used per branches as we didn't have much admission of students. The classrooms were wide having four ceiling fans each and full length windows on both sides with a very big blackboard that was enough to write atleast two programs of code.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the college. I suggest you don't waste your valuable time.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements from 2015 to 2019. There are no placements. None of the companies visits our campus for placements. There were 1% placements for CSE department. There were no placements for mechanical, civil engineering. Management is the worst, and I think this college will lose affiliation.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are good but not up to the mark. Hostel facility is available here. I suggest not to join in this college and don't waste your valuable time.
review_content.Faculty: The college management is waste. They don't know the subject and management are not responsible for studying. They are teaching for time pass. Theory classes were not conducted. They need only money from students, especially in the examination branch. It is the worst college in Telangana except for labs, and all are waste. Every year the pass percentage is below 20%. It is better to avoid this college. However, the campus is nice.

review_summary.college_name: Hasmukh Goswami College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Tier-3 college but not very bad.

content.Placements: College doesn't attract good companies but there's placement at gtu level every year where you can get equal opportunity to get job in your desired company. There are companies like L&T, ABB, Torrent Power etc. Package depends on the company and your skill. Minimum package can around 1.8LPA and the highest can be around 4-5LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good. Labs are average. One of the best things about the college is the library. It's big and has no of books of wide range of topics from technical to non technical and also good librarians. I didn't use hostel facility, but as far as I know they provide Wi-Fi and good food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It's good if you can self-study. Placements are good & you won't face any problems after graduation.

content.Placements: There are good placement facilities here. Around 60% of the students got placed. The average salary package is around 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Some companies for our course like Mega, Torrent Power, Reliance, etc., visit the campus. Plenty of students got internships at ONGC, which is more than 50% of students. The construction manager is good for our course.
content.Infrastructure: It has free Wi-Fi and each branch has its different labs, and classrooms are good enough. The library is not much good, and there are very less books in the library. The quality of the hostel is good, it's clean and good. The quality food is served in the canteen for hostel students is good. There is a big ground for sports and games so, students enjoy the outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for infrastructure and faculty, and it also provides good placements.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 14 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. 60% of students got placed. The top IT companies like TCS, Amazon and Hitachi came here. The top roles offered by companies is software developer, quality analysis and web design and also cybersecurity.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The gate, campus and classrooms are good. Digital boards and big benches are available. AC labs are available with Apple computers. Canteen facilities are available, with good and healthy food. Sports and games are available. A huge playground is available to play different sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Hasmukh Goswami College of Engineering.

content.Placements: I am studying in this college for the last 3 years, and I felt there are many opportunities for students studying in this college. Many students have achieved high packages like 3 to 6.5 LPA and above. Packages are offered based on the skills students have. Companies like Ultracet, BYJU's, Ambuja Cement, etc., come here. For BBA and B.Com students, companies like ICICI Bank, Jio Communities and other multinational companies visited here.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides very good hostels for both girls and boys. Facilities like Wi-Fi, cool water, etc., are available. Students who came here to attend their GU exam also appreciated the infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our institute has all the necessary physical infrastructure and ultra-modern equipment, etc.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good. Minimum 5-10 students get placed. The college offers the students their own cources. Students are offered different salary packages. Around 5% of students get an internship from the college. Students are offered roles in every field. The students also get a scholarship from our college.
content.Infrastructure: HGCE transcends the boundaries of the time and location to provide a perpetual learning environment for all. It is a premier institution that upholds an extremely modern and state-of-art infrastructure that goes in a way in facilitating impeccable services for their students as well as the staff member. The college offers campus facilities, health centres, medical services, libraries, transportation, etc.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good of HGCE but it isn't big like other private colleges. Out department have all labs with all equipment which are  required in course curriculum. reviews.review_heading: Review of Hasmukh Goswami College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, auditorium hall, playground, garden, smart class, parking lot, canteen, etc., are available. The facility of the hostel is decent, and the quality of the food served is good, and it's available at its routine schedule as always. reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college provides good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure and design of the building is also good. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Every department has different labs with machine and equipment. Classrooms are good and designed with neutral atmosphere. The canteen is available in our college. Good food is also available here.

reviews.review_heading: One who is truly interested in studies can visit our college once.
reviews.review_text: Our college has an awesome infrastructure. There are farms surrounding the college, and so we can get a peaceful atmosphere. Good facilities are provided in the college for students to study well. The college is located in a good place. Overall, the infrastructure is the best part of our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Hasmukh Goswami College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, and it is still under construction. The canteen and parking area are not much good. A temple is under construction. The library is very impressive, and we find can each book there. The entire fourth floor of the building is dedicated to the Library. Each branch has a separate building.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good college and all the facilities required to study are provided.
reviews.review_text: The college has a nice infrastructure. The college provides many facilities like Wi-Fi, different labs, many sports equipment, and a big playground. A lot of useful equipment is available in the labs, and they are all in good working conditions. Good quality of food is available in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: One can choose IT or computer branch for placements, but not civil branch.
reviews.review_text: During my tenure, we were not allowed to use phones in the class. Wi-Fi facility was provided for only faculty members but not students. Labs and classrooms are good. But, there were no smart classrooms in the beginning. New year celebration and sports day are one of the best things in college. Attendance of every day is sent to parents, so parents get to know if their ward has attended the class or not.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It is improving day by day. Facilities include free Wi-Fi, large classrooms, a huge library and sports ground. The canteen is small. Stationery is also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities, average placements and excellent faculty.
reviews.review_text: The building on the campus is small compared to others. Many facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs, library, medical room, machine labs for the civil and mechanical department, indoor-outdoor games, etc., were provided in the college. Labs and classrooms were very well-ventilated and clean. Food provided in the canteen was not much good.

reviews.review_heading: The way of teaching is good. The infrastructure is small. The hostel is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was a bit small, but it was sufficient to accommodate all the branches. All the branches are well-accommodated in two buildings. Our college provides the Wi-Fi facilities, but network range was average. Classrooms were very neat and clean. We have a huge library, and it has a lot of academic books, novels, all types of newspapers. The hostel is situated behind the college. The food offered in the hostel was not good. The infrastructure in the hostel rooms is goo...

individual_reviews.title: Everything is good, but there is no proper management and permanent faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are not provided since I started studying in college. The placement cell was superb, but there was no placement officer. CRT classes are also not provided for final year students. At least they are not giving information about off-campus placements.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and the library are provided with high quality, but due to less usage and no proper maintenance, equipment is not in use. Food is the best and provided with high quality and better quantity, and students are satisfied with food. Timings of the library were not followed, and there are no updated journals.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied because of teachers, good placements provided in 2015 and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: About 67% of the students from our stream were placed. The lowest salary package offered here was 2 LPA and the highest salary package offered was 6 LPA. The top recruiting company for our course is Navayuga Constructions Pvt Ltd, and the top role offered in our course is a junior structural engineer. We got 8 more companies, which were led by my placement authority. Two companies out of them were not our core companies. However, we tried those interviews to gain some knowledge about interviews and to get rid of the fear of interviews.

individual_reviews.title: Very good college with good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Very nice. Cognizant, Surya Tech solutions, HGS, Vertex, Infosys, IBM, In our college we have individual branch association leading with their branch HOD. Students will be selected as President, Vice president, treasurer, secretary, joint secretary and some Coordinators. Technical Fests and Workshops are conducted by students under the guidance of respective HOD.
content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi, good classroom well furnished, library with around 23000 volumes, Good food will nice canteen, big seminar hall with around 500 seating capacity and function hall with 1500 seating,. Peaceful climate with trees and grass around. Love this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The college is good in infrastructure, but bad in rules.

content.Placements: The placements were not that much good for us even for the senior batches. Approximately 20% were got selected. They offered nearly 6 lakh per annum. Globussoft, Infosys, HCL are major companies that visited our college. There is a good placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was awesome. Ther are proper lab facilities for all type of courses. The library is available for the students. There is no sports and games for the students. The canteen was good.
content.Faculty: The faculty were very good in giving the information to the students. When comes to teaching quality, some are not at all professionals and giving classes. Few were very at the technical side. We didn't get even single industry exposure from the college. It was very bad for us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015

content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good, but there are strict rules for the students. It should not be like that for students. Apart from that rest is okay. The canteen needs to develop.
